role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of evidence (no legible text) and remained silent.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and architectural style within domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation types and biome characteristics within domain.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road surfaces, paving, and infrastructure standards within domain.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture, utility poles, camera artifacts) within domain.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Norway. The agents adhered strictly to their roles, with the landscape and meta agents providing the strongest visual evidence (architecture, terrain). The linguistic agent correctly noted the absence of text. The final decision was well-supported by the specialist consensus.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described white wooden siding, steep roofs, and stone walls.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly identified cobblestone and asphalt paving.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified slate roofs and utility poles.
